summary: Frontend-only Expo app for Korean hanja study tested end-to-end on 390x844 mobile viewport. All 5 bottom tabs, home widgets, level browsing (swipe), character detail (HanziWriter WebView), save/bookmark, daily path generation, search (학→11 results), and 10-question quiz with done screen all working correctly.

issues: detail-save icon uses same 'bookmark' name for both saved and unsaved states — only color differs. Consider 'bookmark' vs filled variant for clearer toggle feedback.

action_items: Optional: use different icon (e.g., bookmark vs bookmark-plus or filled) for save toggle visual clarity.
Note: 'home-streak' shows '0 day' initially; consider '0 days' pluralization. Minor polish.
critical_code_review_comments: character/[id].tsx: bumpStreak+markStudied runs on every mount (including daily-review visits) — as per requirements this is intended, but ensure markStudied/bumpStreak are idempotent per day which storage.ts handles.
quiz.tsx buildQuestions uses Math.random directly — not seedable; fine for MVP.
All interactive elements have proper testID; StyleSheet.create used; Text components wrap text correctly.
seed_data_creation: None — data bundled as JSON (167 chars, 176 words).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is purely frontend Expo. Use viewport 390x844. All core flows verified: tabs nav, levels→browse→detail, save, daily plan (5 new chips rendered), search (학=11 results), quiz (10 questions → done screen with score). HanziWriter WebView mounts via CDN — rendering of animation itself not asserted but screen loads without red screen.
rca_of_issue: No bugs identified during this iteration.
